channel.title: Context Management on Mengboy Tech Notes
channel.description: Recent content in Context Management on Mengboy Tech Notes

item.title: Taming Context Explosion in OpenAI Assistants/Responses with Go: Truncation, Summary Backfill, and Cost Caps
item.description:
Long-running agent sessions usually fail the same way: context keeps growing, latency spikes, costs blow up, and answer quality gets worse.

That is rarely a model-quality issue. It is almost always missing context governance.
